Article Title: Ayesha Curry: “Every girl was obsessed with him”: Stephen Curry’s wife Ayesha Curry admits she struggled with insecurity in their relationship
Article Text:
Stephen Curry’s wife Ayesha Curry admits she struggled with insecurity in their relationship.(Image via Getty Images)

Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, shares the insecurities she faced when she met the NBA legend



Why has Ayesha Curry attracted so much hate for her comments regarding her high profile marriage to Stephen Curry?



Stephen Curry, the NBA legend and the Golden State Warriors, has been a force to be reckoned with on court but at home, he has turned out to be a pretty supportive father and husband to his children and wife, Ayesha Curry While Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have often spoken about their love and commitment for one another, she has often raised eyebrows with some of her controversial remarks. Amid all the mess, the popular entrepreneur and chef has opened up about her insecurities.A few years ago, in a heartfelt interview with PEOPLE, Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, opened up about women surrounding the NBA legend.Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, said, “We were just kids…”The Golden State Warriors’ star player added, “He was the cute boy at church that all of the girls were obsessed with, so I made a generalization that maybe he wasn’t for me.”Interestingly, this was not the first time that Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, has opened up about women pursuing the NBA legend.In 2019, as she spoke to Jada Pinkett Smith on her now canceled show, Ayesha Curry had opened up about women having constantly pursued Stephen Curry and it “irks her nerves”.The four time NBA champion has maintained his distance from such comments as he has only spoken about his wife and their four young children in public.In the same interview with PEOPLE, Stephen Curry opened up about meeting his wife for the first time and said, “I don’t remember the exact first day I saw her…”The Golden State Warriors’ star player added, “There was no wind blowing in her face with a backlight.”However, both Stephen Curry and his wife, Ayesha Curry, have been constantly criticised for their marriage.Over the last few years, the popular chef and entrepreneur Ayesha Curry has been more public about their marriage and it has attracted a lot of hate.Despite the drama, both Stephen Curry and his wife, Ayesha Curry, have stayed distant from all the controversy as they keep their focus on their four young children and their marriage.Both have often spoken about how they always prioritise their marriage and even amid all the controversies, Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry seem deeply in love with each other.
Article Summary: Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, shares the insecurities she faced when she met the NBA legend. The popular entrepreneur and chef has often raised eyebrows with some of her controversial remarks. Both Stephen Curry and his wife have been constantly criticised for their marriage.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Travis Kelce Wedding Rumors: Did Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce secretly get married? Rumors explode after new podcast moment
Article Text:
(Image via Backgrid)

New Heights

Travis Kelce may have revealed his marriage to Taylor Swift during this viral clip



"You gotta ask your wife first."

Watch Jon Hamm on Meme Life, Busted Brackets, Masters Dinner Debate & A New Bearcat in Town | Ep 185 Jon Hamm on Meme Life, Busted Brackets, Masters Dinner Debate & A New Bearcat in Town | Ep 185

"Exactly. Sweetie, I’m going back to school!"

The internet has officially gone into meltdown mode following the latest episode of thepodcast. Fans of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are convinced the couple has secretly tied the knot after Travis seemingly confirmed his new marital status during a casual conversation.The moment occurred during the April 1, 2026, episode of the show. Travis and his brother Jason were interviewing a guest, identified in reports as either Cincinnati coach Wes Miller or actor Jon Hamm when the topic of Travis’s future came up. While joking about the tight end potentially going back to school to play college sports under new eligibility rules, the guest told Travis,Instead of correcting the guest or clarifying that they are only engaged, Travis leaned into the comment with a smile. He looked toward the camera and jokingly said,While the couple has been officially engaged since August 2025, this is the first time Travis has publicly used or accepted the term "wife" in relation to Taylor Swift. For many fans, this wasn't just a slip of the tongue, it was a "soft launch" of their new reality.Many "Swifties" believe the couple eloped in a private ceremony to avoid the massive media circus expected for their rumored June 13 wedding in Rhode Island. The logic is simple, Travis is usually very careful with his words, so calling her "Sweetie" in response to being called a husband felt like a deliberate choice.Despite the excitement, there are plenty of reasons to remain skeptical.Sharp-eyed viewers noted that Travis was not wearing a wedding band during the recording of the episode. Most major outlets still report that the "real" wedding is scheduled for June 13, 2026, at Taylor’s Ocean House estate.Whether it was a genuine reveal or a masterclass in trolling, the "Sweetie" comment has become the biggest entertainment news story of the year. For now, the world is left wondering: are they already Mr. and Mrs. Kelce, or was this just a legendary April Fools' joke? Either way, the "New Heights" for this couple just keep getting higher.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce may have revealed his marriage to Taylor Swift during this viral clip. Fans of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are convinced the couple has secretly tied the knot. The moment occurred during the April 1, 2026, episode of the show.

Article Title: Evander Kane: “We are so proud of you!”: Evander Kane’s partner Mara Teigen congratulates the Vancouver Canucks forward on his 1,000th NHL game
Article Text:
Evander Kane with fiancee and long-time partner Mara Teigen (Image via: Getty Images)

Mara Teigen congratulates partner Evander Kane after completing his 1,000th NHL game

Evander Kane is one of the most promising forwards of the Vancouver Canucks, who is known for his dynamic skills and excellent goal-scoring abilities. On Monday night, when the Vancouver Canucks locked horns with the Vegas Golden Knights, where Canucks forward Evander Kane officially played in the 1,000th game of his NHL career. On reaching this remarkable feat, Evander Kane’s partner, Mara Teigen, congratulated the Vancouver Canucks forward on playing his 1,000th NHL game.With this, Kane became the 424th player in league history to reach the millennial mark, and the 16th player to do so this season. In addition to this, he also became the fourth player to reach 1,000 games this month, joining Minnesota Wild captain Jared Spurgeon, New York Rangers forward Mika Zibanejad, and Seattle Kraken defenseman Adam Larsson. According to the NHL, in 70 games played, he scored 13 goals, 18 assists, and gained 31 points this season.Vancouver Canucks forward Evander Kane’s partner, Mara Teigen, congratulated her partner after Kane completed his 1,000th NHL game on Monday. Teigen took to her social media to share the message on her fiancé’s achievement, despite Canucks losing the match. As per reports, Evander Kane achieved the milestone in a 4–2 loss for Vancouver; however, Kane still made the night memorable by scoring a goal in his historic appearance.Following his achievement, Mara Teigen shared several pictures of herself and Kane on Instagram, where she was seen enjoying the match between the Canucks and the Vegas Golden Knights. Congratulating Kane, she wrote, "1,000 NHL games for my man. We are so proud of you. You are one of one @evanderkane can you tell well I was excited."In the picture, she was seen cheering for her partner from the stands, while wearing a T-shirt featuring Kane’s image with 1,000 written on it.It is to be noted that Evander Kane and his fiancée, Mara Teigen, have been together for more than a decade. They rekindled their relationship in 2021 and got engaged in September 2024. They share three children, sons Iverson and Hendrix, and daughter Penelope, born this year. Besides, Kane also has a daughter, Kensington, from his previous marriage.Evander Kane and Mara Teigen are quite active on social media, and they frequently share pictures on social media, portraying their love and commitment to each other.Earlier, in his first 999 regular-season games in the NHL, Kane had scored 338 goals and 309 assists for 647 points, with another 55 points in 97 postseason games. Besides, Kane became the ninth player in NHL history to enter the 1,000th game. With this feat, he joins the group of NHL legends like Pit Martin, Ryan Walter, Dave Babych, Trevor Linden, Markus Naslund, Henrik and Daniel Sedin, and Tyler Myers.
Article Summary: Vancouver Canucks forward Evander Kane completed his 1,000th NHL game on Monday. Kane became the 424th player in league history to reach the mark, and the 16th player to do so this season. Kane's partner, Mara Teigen, congratulated her partner on his achievement. Teigen took to her social media to share the message on her fiancé's achievement.

Article Title: Stefanos Tsitsipas: Stefanos Tsitsipas mindset questioned as Goran Ivanisevic shares early concerns from their short coaching partnership
Article Text:
Stefanos Tsitsipas and Goran Ivanisevic (Image Via Getty)

Goran Ivanisevic explains why Stefanos Tsitsipas struggled during their partnership

Things did not go as expected when Goran Ivanisevic joined hands with Stefanos Tsitsipas last year. What looked like a strong partnership on paper ended quickly, and now Ivanisevic has opened up about what really went wrong. His latest comments have raised fresh concerns about Tsitsipas’ mindset during that phase.Speaking in an interview with Sportklub, Ivanisevic said he felt early on that something was not right. He made it clear that the issue was not just about fitness or form. According to him, Tsitsipas was struggling mentally too, which made it hard for him to compete at the top level. The comments have come at a time when Tsitsipas is still trying to find consistency on court.Ivanisevic started working with Tsitsipas around May last year. At that time, the Greek player was already dealing with poor results and fitness issues. Many believed Ivanisevic, who helped Novak Djokovic win multiple Grand Slams, could help him bounce back.But things did not improve. After Tsitsipas retired early at Wimbledon, Ivanisevic openly shared his concerns. Looking back now, he said he had noticed the problem almost immediately.He said, “Well, I knew that after the second day of our training. When he came to Zagreb to try out the rackets, I knew that none of that would happen. I mean, at the end of the day, I didn’t say anything bad. Everything I said was true and it came true. I told him nicely after Wimbledon to take four months off because it’s not just physical unpreparedness, but mental unpreparedness as well.”Despite the criticism, Ivanisevic also made it clear that he still respects Tsitsipas as a player. He said the Greek has the talent but needs to be mentally strong in today’s game.He added, “He is still a phenomenal tennis player, he was and still is, but those are the little things. In today’s tennis, you can’t play if you’re not mentally prepared. I had those problems as a tennis player too, when I fell to 128th place, I was the best benchmark.”The two have since moved on. Ivanisevic is now working with young player Arthur Fils, while Tsitsipas has brought back his father Apostolos as his coach. According to Ivanisevic, there is no bad blood between them.He said, “But everything is ok, we saw each other in Doha now and we said goodbye normally. Everything got blown up about it, he said some things now that we won’t go into detail about, but everything is ok, let’s move on.”Tsitsipas’ recent loss at the Miami Open, where he went down 0-6, 1-6 to Fils, has only added more pressure as he looks to rebuild his form.
Article Summary: Goran Ivanisevic has opened up about his partnership with Stefanos Tsitsipas. He said he felt early on that something was not right with the Greek player. The two have since moved on from their partnership, with Ivanisingvic now working with Arthur Fils.

Article Title: Martina Navratilova: Martina Navratilova sends strong message to Emma Raducanu over coaching changes as Miami Open withdrawal raises fresh concerns
Article Text:
Martina Navratilova sends strong message to Emma Raducanu over coaching changes as Miami Open withdrawal raises fresh concerns (Image via getty)

Martina Navratilova urges Emma Raducanu to stay patient with one coach and build stability

Emma Raducanu explains her side as she avoids long-term coach commitment and focuses on her natural game



Emma Raducanu is once again in the spotlight, but this time it is not about a big win. It is about her constant coaching changes. The 2021 US Open champion has worked with many coaches in a short time, and that pattern has raised fresh questions about her progress. Now, tennis legend Martina Navratilova has stepped in with a clear message. Speaking to Sky Sports during the Miami Open, Navratilova said Raducanu needs to choose carefully and stay with one coach longer. Her words come at a time when Raducanu’s form has been up and down, and injuries have also slowed her down this season.Martina Navratilova did not hold back, but her tone stayed calm and helpful. She pointed out that changing coaches too often makes it hard to grow.“I mean, I don’t know what’s the record for a coach- maybe six months! So, I wish that she would really pick whoever she wants to be her coach carefully and then stick with it,” Navratilova said.She also explained why time matters in a player-coach relationship.“Give it a year because it takes a while to be comfortable with making changes and being able to incorporate the person into your game. The biggest thing I see, I think she could get fitter, which the coach has nothing to do with, but you know, the coach can only do so much. Pick the right coach and stick with him or her, please!”Emma Raducanu’s recent numbers show the struggle. She has a 7-7 record this year.She lost in the Round of 32 at Indian Wells to Amanda Anisimova and then pulled out of the Miami Open due to a lower back injury and illness.Her last full-time coach, Francisco Roig, left after the Australian Open. He is now working with Iga Swiatek. Before him, Raducanu had already worked with several names, including Andrew Richardson, who guided her to the US Open title, along with others like Torben Beltz and Dmitry Tursunov.Emma Raducanu has a different view. She says finding one perfect coach is not simple and comes with pressure.“I don’t necessarily want to have one coach in the role because anyone I bring in is straight away going to be scrutinised- even if it’s a trial. I might feel the pressure to stick with them, even if it’s not necessarily the right decision,” she told BBC Sport.She also shared that too many voices have affected her style.“I have had a lot of people telling me what to do, how to play, and it hasn’t necessarily fit. I want to come back to my natural way of playing. That takes time to relearn because that’s something that has been coached out of me a little bit.”Right now, she is working without a full-time coach, alongside her hitting partner Alexis Canter and physio Emma Stewart.There are signs of progress. Her ranking has improved over the past two years, and in 2025 she had a solid run with deep results in Washington and Miami. In early 2026, she reached the final in Cluj-Napoca, showing she is moving in the right direction. Still, her career sits at an important point. The next steps, especially her coaching choice, could shape what comes next.
Article Summary: Martina Navratilova urges Emma Raducanu to stay patient with one coach and build stability in her career. The 2021 US Open champion has worked with many coaches in a short time, and that pattern has raised fresh questions about her progress. Her last full-time coach, Francisco Roig, left after the Australian Open.

Article Title: Winnipeg Jets: “We can't take our foot off the gas": Winnipeg Jets surge to the playoff race, needs one point for the wild-card spot
Article Text:
Winnipeg Jets are back in the playoff run after a strong run of form, climbing to within just one point of a Western Conference playoff spot (Image via Reuters Photo)

Winnipeg Jets surge back into playoff race with win over the Chicago Blackhawks, just one point back of the wild-card spot

Watch How have Jets gotten back into playoff race? How have Jets gotten back into playoff race?

The Winnipeg Jets are back in the playoff run after a strong run of form, climbing to within just one point of a Western Conference playoff spot following a crucial overtime win over the Chicago Blackhawks. As reported by TSN, the Jets have gone 17-11-8 in 2026, to sit one point behind the Nashville Predators for the final wild-card spot in the Western Conference. Reports suggest that the Jets secured a 4–3 overtime victory.Prominent players like Kyle Connor scored just 33 seconds into overtime after a setup from Mark Scheifele, who recorded three assists in the game. In addition to this, Josh Morrissey, Cole Perfetti, and Isak Rosén also scored for the Jets. As per the NHL , Winnipeg now shares that 76‑point total with the Los Angeles Kings, who have played one fewer game, giving the Jets a narrow edge in the current playoff standings.The Winnipeg Jets' last-minute surge has put them on track for their goal of reaching the upcoming NHL playoffs after defeating the Chicago Blackhawks on Monday night. They are sitting just one point back of the final Western Conference wild-card spot.As per the NHL, the Jets will enter the playoffs with a 76‑point ledger (32–30–12), one point behind the idle Nashville Predators for the second wild‑card berth. Winnipeg has 76 points, similar to the Los Angeles Kings, who have played one fewer game, giving the Jets a narrow but meaningful edge in the standings.According to the NHL, Winnipeg has won four of its past five games, fighting against the Predators, Los Angeles Kings, San Jose Sharks, and Seattle Kraken for the last playoff spot, with all four teams within two points of each other. The St. Louis Blues also remain in the race, just four points back of Nashville with a game in hand.As the team is hoping to do well in the playoff race, the head coach of the Jets, Scott Arniel, said after a 4-3 overtime win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Tuesday. “We just said to take care of our own business, and that’s what we’re trying to do. We got ourselves here, but we can’t take our foot off the gas.” He further added, “We have got to make sure that we continue to do those things that keep us in games and that give us a chance to win. ”Meanwhile, the Jets captain, Adam Lowry, said after winning the game, “We know every game is important. We came and talked about it after the first intermission. We don’t have time to just squander points. We can’t have these letdowns where we play one great game, and then come down and take a breath. So, it was a big win for us. You know, tight game. You’ve got to give Chicago credit. I thought they played a pretty good game. ”Winnipeg will now look to carry this momentum into its upcoming games, as it is just behind by one point in the Stanley Cup playoffs. They are now preparing to face the Dallas Stars on Thursday as their playoff push continues.
Article Summary: Winnipeg Jets are back in the playoff run after a strong run of form, climbing to within just one point of a Western Conference playoff spot following a crucial overtime win over the Chicago Blackhawks. The Jets have gone 17-11-8 in 2026, to sit one point behind the Nashville Predators for the final wild-card spot in the Western Conference.

Article Title: Stephen A Smith: Stephen A Smith questions Tiger Woods after DUI arrest as driver refusal and privacy stance raise serious concerns
Article Text:
Stephen A Smith questions Tiger Woods after DUI arrest as driver refusal and privacy stance raise serious concerns(Image via Getty)

Stephen A. Smith questions Tiger Woods’ decision and raises concerns over privacy and repeated driving issues

Scott Van Pelt shifts focus to Tiger Woods’ health, personal loss, and need for support before golf return

Stephen A. Smith has spoken openly about Tiger Woods, and this time his words came right after the golf star’s recent DUI arrest. The incident happened near Woods’ home in Jupiter, Florida, where his car crashed and police later found signs that he was not fully in control. Even though Woods denied being drunk and passed a breath test, officers said he showed signs of impairment and found pills in his possession. Soon after, Woods said he would step away and focus on recovery. But as the story grew, one detail caught attention, a report by People.com claimed Woods does not want to hire a driver because he values his privacy.That detail is what pushed Smith to question Woods publicly. Speaking on ESPN’s First Take, he raised concerns about Woods’ past driving history and the risks involved.Stephen A. Smith did not hold back while talking about Tiger Woods. He reminded viewers that Woods has had multiple driving-related incidents.“You’ve been behind the wheel of a vehicle inebriated three times,” Smith said. “You know, ain’t nobody trying to know all your business. What we want to know is that you ain’t gonna get behind the wheel of a car when you’re inebriated. You’re lucky you didn’t kill somebody.”He then focused on the report about Woods not wanting a driver.“You must have a very highly suspect life if you, as a billionaire, don’t even want to hire a driver,” Smith added.“You want your privacy? Privacy from what? What’s the driver going to do? Because he dropped you off someplace, he’ll know where he dropped you off? I mean, what are you trying to hide?” His comments quickly became a big talking point, especially because Woods had just said he wants to focus on his health and recovery.While Smith questioned Woods, Scott Van Pelt took a softer and more personal approach. Speaking on ESPN, he made it clear that golf should not be the main concern right now.“I have to be honest, after what happened, I don’t care if I see him next week,” Van Pelt said.“I care that the human being I’ve known for all these years is well. Whatever needs to happen, I hope it does.”He also spoke about the emotional and physical toll Woods has faced recently, including the loss of his mother, Kultida Woods.“He’s gone through a significant loss in the last year and a half of his mom,” he said.“He’s going through a cycle of injury and rehab and the toll that that takes. And, this is another accident.”Van Pelt added that he hopes people close to Woods step in and help him.“I hope that whoever is close enough to him to have whatever conversation needs to be had about whatever help might be needed, that that is had.”As ESPN prepares for Masters coverage, Van Pelt said more details about the situation would help shape better discussions, but he stressed that Woods’ well-being matters more than anything else right now.
Article Summary: Stephen A. Smith questioned Tiger Woods about his recent DUI arrest. He reminded viewers that Woods has had multiple driving-related incidents. He then focused on the report about Woods not wanting a driver. Scott Van Pelt took a softer and more personal approach. He stressed that Woods' well-being matters more than anything else right now.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding: Will Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds be at Taylor Swift’s wedding to Travis Kelce? Inside the guest list drama
Article Text:
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce - Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds (Getty Images)

Why Taylor Swift may leave Blake Lively off her wedding guest list amid fallout rumors



Deadpool

If you had “Blake Lively and Taylor Swift falling out” on your 2026 bingo card, go ahead and collect your prize. As the countdown to the Swift-Kelce wedding hits the home stretch, the biggest question isn't about the dress or the flowers, it’s about the guest list. Specifically: Where in the world are the Reynolds?For years, Blake and Taylor were the ultimate "squad" goals. From Fourth of July parties to box seats at Chiefs games, they were inseparable. But lately? The vibes are officially off. If you’ve been living under a rock, here’s the tea: things got messy during Blake’s legal drama with her former co-star, Justin Baldoni.The drama went nuclear when some private texts between the two BFFs leaked during a court case. Apparently, Taylor wasn't thrilled to find out her name was being used as "clout" in Blake’s industry beefs. Rumor has it Blake referred to her high-powered friends as her "dragons" basically, the muscle she could call in to settle scores.For Taylor, who is currently in her "Privacy & Peace" era, being dragged into a courtroom circus was the ultimate dealbreaker. Insiders say Tay felt "exposed" and "used," which is a big no-no when you're trying to plan a secret, stress-free wedding.The internet detectives have already found the receipts. Travis recently unfollowed Ryan on Instagram, which is basically the modern-day version of throwing a glove in someone's face. Meanwhile, the couple has been radio silent on each other's big wins. No "congrats" posts, no heart emojis just vibes and silence.Word on the street is that Taylor and Travis are keeping the circle tight. Travis, who is all about "good energy only," reportedly backed Taylor’s decision to keep the guest list limited to people they can 100% trust. With the wedding set for June 13th in Rhode Island, the window for a "we’re sorry" brunch is closing fast.At this point, seeing Blake and Ryan at the Ocean House would be more shocking than a Kanye West cameo. Taylor is looking for "Classic and Timeless," and unfortunately, it looks like this friendship has become "Vintage and Over."Don’t expect to see thestar or his wife in any of the (heavily guarded) wedding photos. It looks like this "Love Story" has officially edited out two of its longest-running supporting characters. Stay tuned, because in the world of Taylor Swift, the drama is always part of the bridge.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are getting married on June 13. Rumors are swirling that Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds won't be on the guest list. Insiders say Taylor felt "exposed" and "used," which is a big no-no.

Article Title: Emma Raducanu: Emma Raducanu’s repeated withdrawals including Linz Open hint at deeper fitness concerns after February viral infection setback
Article Text:
Emma Raducanu (Image Via Getty)

Emma Raducanu struggles with post-viral symptoms as comeback plans shift

It has been a frustrating few weeks for Emma Raducanu. The British star has pulled out of another tournament, and this time it is the Linz Open. Her team confirmed that she is still dealing with a viral illness that began earlier this year. Because of this, she is not yet ready to return to full competition.This comes shortly after she also withdrew from the Miami Open. At the same time, she skipped Great Britain’s Billie Jean King Cup qualifier against Australia. Right now, her main focus is simple, get fully fit before stepping back on court. The hope is that she could return later this month at the Madrid Open, but nothing is confirmed yet.Raducanu last played at Indian Wells on March 8. That match did not go her way. She lost 6-1, 6-1 to Amanda Anisimova in the third round. After the match, she spoke honestly about how she felt on court.“I need to obviously be aggressive when playing those players, but I think there’s still a long way to go to be doing that and I need to use my strengths and probably mix it up a bit more,” she said.It was clear she was not at her best physically. The illness she picked up in Romania in early February has stayed with her longer than expected.These post-viral symptoms have affected her energy levels and power, which are key parts of her game.Because of that, her team has decided not to rush things. Instead of pushing through tournaments, she is focusing on recovery and training. The aim is to return stronger rather than risk another setback.There are also changes happening off the court. Since parting ways with coach Francisco Roig in January, Raducanu has been working in a more flexible setup. She is currently training with Mark Petchey on an informal basis. This setup gives her more control as she rebuilds her game and fitness.For now, everything depends on how her body responds in the coming days. The Madrid Open is seen as a possible return point, but only if she feels ready. There is no pressure from her team to rush back. Right now, the focus is clear. Health comes first. Tennis can wait a little longer.
Article Summary: Emma Raducanu has pulled out of the Linz Open. Her team confirmed that she is still dealing with a viral illness. Because of this, she is not yet ready to return to full competition. The hope is that she could return later this month at the Madrid Open.

Article Title: Dayton Webber: Dayton Webber’s chilling mugshot emerges as cornhole player accused of shooting friend Bradrick Michael Wells inside car dispute
Article Text:
Dayton Webber’s chilling mugshot emerges as cornhole player accused of shooting friend Bradrick Michael Wells inside car dispute (Image via Getty)

Dayton Webber accused of killing Bradrick Michael Wells after argument inside car, witnesses describe what happened

Dayton Webber’s past, ESPN features, and ex-girlfriend Tori Mattingly ’s claims about his behavior

Dayton Webber is now at the center of a serious murder case , and new details are coming out step by step. The 27-year-old professional cornhole player was taken into custody and brought back to Maryland after police say he shot and killed his friend, Bradrick Michael Wells. His latest mugshot, taken after his return, shows him looking pale and tired.According to officials from the Charles County Sheriff’s Office, the incident happened on March 22. Police say Webber shot Wells during an argument inside a car and later drove away with the body still inside. He now faces first-degree and second-degree murder charges, along with a firearm charge. The case has drawn attention not just because of the crime, but also because of Webber’s past as a known athlete in the cornhole community.Police documents shared by Detective Mark Bigelow explain what witnesses told investigators. On the day of the incident, Dayton Webber drove his white Tesla to pick up two people. When they got into the back seat, Bradrick Michael Wells was already sitting in the front. At some point during the drive, things turned tense. The report says a heated argument broke out between Webber and Wells.Then, according to the witnesses, Webber pulled out a gun and shot Wells twice in the head.After the shooting, Webber allegedly asked the two people in the back seat to help him move the body. They refused and quickly got out of the car. Webber then drove away alone, with Wells still inside the vehicle.Later, Wells was found in a yard on Newport Church Road in Charlotte Hall, Maryland. Emergency responders reached the spot, but he was already dead. Authorities say Webber fled to Virginia after the incident but was later arrested and brought back to Maryland on Tuesday. He is expected to appear in court next month.Dayton Webber’s story had once been seen as inspiring. As a baby, he lost all four limbs due to a severe infection that led to sepsis. Despite that, he learned how to adapt and later became a competitive cornhole player. In 2023, he joined the American Cornhole League and was featured by ESPN.Speaking to ESPN at the time, he said, “It’s something I’ve been doing my whole life, is overcoming things that people didn’t think I can do.”He had also been featured earlier as a young wrestler, showing his determination from a young age.However, his ex-girlfriend Tori Mattingly has now shared a very different side. In an interview with TMZ, she said Webber had an “angry dark side” during their four-year relationship, which ended in February 2025.She said he often had outbursts and refused to get help. In a video she shared, he is seen shouting at her during an argument. She also wrote in a Facebook post, “For four years, I saw the side of him that nobody else wanted to believe existed. The anger. The control. The abuse.”Mattingly added that she was not surprised by the allegations, saying she had already seen that behavior up close.
Article Summary: Dayton Webber, 27, is accused of shooting and killing his friend, Bradrick Michael Wells. Police say Webber shot Wells during an argument inside a car and later drove away with the body still inside. He now faces first-degree and second-degree murder charges, along with a firearm charge. His latest mugshot, taken after his return, shows him looking pale and tired.

Article Title: Megan Thee Stallion Hospital: What happened to Megan Thee Stallion and where was Klay Thompson during her sudden health scare?
Article Text:
Klay Thompson and Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: theestallion/ Instagram

Megan Thee Stallion health scare leaves fans shaken as Broadway performance is cut short



Moulin Rouge!

Megan Thee Stallion gave fans a major scare on Tuesday night when she was rushed to a New York City hospital right in the middle of her Broadway show. The fans were in a total state of shock when the news of her passing out in the middle of her show spread on the internet.It was supposed to be a glitzy night at the Al Hirschfeld Theatre, where Megan has been making history starring in. But the music stopped early when Megan reportedly started feeling "severe distress" while performing on stage.The "Body" singer had to be helped offstage, and the show came to a sudden halt. Minutes later, an ambulance was seen outside the theater, whisking the superstar away to a local emergency room. Her bestie and hairstylist, Kellon Deryck, broke the news to fans on social media, posting a heartfelt message asking for "major prayers" and confirming that her inner circle was gathered at the hospital waiting for answers.As news hit the internet, the rumor mill started spinning at full speed. A popular account on X posted a tip claiming that Megan has been dealing with "chronic stomach pain" for a while and that doctors had to perform "immediate surgery" to fix the problem.What’s the real tea? Right now, Megan’s official spokespeople are being very quiet. They have confirmed she is in the hospital but will only say she is being "evaluated by doctors." They haven't used the word "surgery" yet, but they aren't denying that things are serious. Fans are glued to their phones, waiting to hear if our girl is out of the woods.One person who should be by her side is her boyfriend, NBA champ Klay Thompson. Klay was supposed to be in Minnesota on Tuesday to play with the Dallas Mavericks, but he was a "no-show" on the court.The team officially said he was out for "rest,". Insiders say Klay was in NYC to be with Megan.This health emergency comes at the worst time possible. Megan’s run on Broadway has been the talk of the town, as she is the first woman to ever play the role of the nightclub owner, Harold Zidler. Article Title: Lucas Di Grassi: Lucas Di Grassi explains how to drive an F1 car with fixed energy after Charles Leclerc’s race struggles: “Funny to see top-level drivers having to adapt”
Article Text:
Lucas Di Grassi (Image credit: Instagram)

Lucas Di Grassi shares explainer on driving techniques for a new F1 car



Racing fans react to energy management in new F1 cars



Lucas Di Grassi is back again to explain yet another racing concept for his fans, and this time he has come forward to explain what kept Ferrari driver Charles Leclerc concerned during the F1 Japanese Grand Prix. Charles was struggling with energy management during the recent F1 race, and this caught the attention of Di Grassi. He explained how to manage energy during a race but added that he wants Formula One to be only about performance and nothing else.Lucas Di Grassi shared a video of Charles Leclerc’s radio message during an F1 race and captioned it on Instagram: “Energy constraint is a NEW variable.”Reacting to it, the Lola Yamaha ABT driver said, “So what Charles is saying here is correct and it's actually funny to see that these top level drivers, they are having to adapt their technique with this new 2026 rules.” He went on to explain the physics and the driving techniques required to drive a car that has a fixed amount of energy.”He said, “When energy is actually a resource you have to manage, not like it used to be last year that you can go just flat out and come up with the best technique or performance according to basically pushing the car to the limit without thinking about the energy. When last year, when you have a no limit of energy and you have a very high downforce car, you tend to do the corners in a parabolic shape to maximise the amount of downforce and to maximise the tyre vector capacity given the way you have to approach a corner.So let's say 180 degree corner, you have to do it in a parabolic shape because then you can carry more speed in, you have lower minimum speed because your maximum radius gets reduced but you can accelerate earlier and therefore having more speed all through the straights.”“Now that you have an energy constraint limitation in 2026, what happens is if you do that, you will require more energy to accelerate the car from a lower speed to a higher speed. So the optimum technique is actually not achieving such a high parabolic type of corner but instead maximising your radius and your minimum speed, so the car has higher kinetic energy and requires less energy to accelerate on the next straight. Therefore, the battery can accelerate the car for longer together with the combustion engine, and then the clipping and the super clipping happen later, so you actually gain time. But it's very interesting that these top level drivers have to adapt to what they have to do, and it's very, very interesting to see that these things are being discussed live on the radio,” he added.Still making it clear that he doesn’t agree with the new F1 rules, he said, “Formula 1 should be about maximum performance but it is definitely a tricky and difficult technique to balance these two worlds. How you maximise some corners for pure performance and try to maximise the downforce and at the same time you have this constraint of energy that you have to regulate and balance it out.”Racing fans seem to be divided over the new F1 regulations. A fan reacted to Lucas Di Grassi’s video, “F1 is no longer about racing. RIP.” Another said, “F1 is dead.” One more added, “F1 trying to become FE... Who would have thought.”But a fan asked, “Isn’t controlling every single element and variable what it takes to be a good driver?” Another added, “But this happens to Ferrari mostly in medium-speed and high-speed corners; in slow-speed corners, thanks to the small turbo, they can have a slight advantage on acceleration out of those corners.”Formula E is currently on a month-long break and will return with Round 7 in Berlin. The Berlin double-header is scheduled from 1-3 May.Also read: Lucas Di Grassi highlights power of learning from mistakes: “Error-correcting is the algorithm of evolution”
Article Summary: Lucas Di Grassi shared a video of Charles Leclerc’s radio message during an F1 race and captioned it on Instagram: “Energy constraint is a NEW variable” He went on to explain the physics and the driving techniques required to drive a car that has a fixed amount of energy. He added that he wants Formula One to be only about performance.

Article Title: Edoardo Mortara: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Text:
Edoardo Mortara is second in Formula E Drivers' Standings. (Image credit: Instagram)

With two back-to-back poles and two podiums in just five races, you are already on a roll this season. You are even close to leading the championship. Describe the feeling.

You missed out on the title twice. What’s the vision for this season? Are we already talking to the winner of Season 12?

Have you made significant changes to your driving style or behind-the-scenes work, the results of which are now evident on the track?

How is Mahindra Racing treating you as a driver? How much credit goes to the team when a driver shines on track?

You are one year short of 40. How long do you aim to continue competing, and what would you like to do after retirement?

What do you like to do when you’re not racing?

Edoardo Mortara has been a force to be reckoned with ever since he started the season with a bang. The Mahindra Racing has delivered top-notch performance so far and is currently leading the championship from the front row, just eleven points behind Porsche’s Pascal Wehrlein. What makes the Swiss racer dominate the scene this season is his consistency on track after having finished among the top six in last five races and bagging two podiums among them, one in Mexico City and the other in Jeddah.Needless to say, Mortara is proving he is no easy mortal among his competitors as he keeps his eyes glued on the prize. In an exclusive interview with TimesofIndia.com, Mortara opened up about his success so far and what lies behind such a grit and determination. He also spoke about his other interests in life and his views on retirement, which is not on his mind right now. Excerpts:First of all, I’m very happy that we had a strong start to the season. It’s always nice to compete at the front and to be able to score a good amount of points, for me but also for the team.Good results also boost everyone in the team. For me personally, it’s very rewarding because it proves that the entire team, myself included, is going in the right direction with the development that we have been implementing over the last three years.We’ve only done five races, so it’s still a very long season.As I said, we’ve had quite a strong start, but most of the races are still ahead of us. In championships like Formula E, it’s very important to stay with your feet on the ground and try to maximize every race weekend. What matters is being among the top guys at the end of the season, not after five races.As drivers, we are always trying to maximize the performance of the package that we are driving. It’s very important to adapt your driving style based on what you have at your disposal in order to extract the maximum from it. So every year, every race, every corner, I am trying to adapt rather than stick to one specific driving style. To be a good racing driver, you need to be able to adapt to whatever is given to you.In motorsport, the package has a very strong influence on the results you are able to achieve. Mahindra Racing is treating me well, especially this season because we’ve been able to perform quite strongly. Without a strong car and a strong team, it’s impossible for a driver to shine.And often the opposite is also true: when the package is not the best, it becomes difficult for the driver to shine as well.For me, it’s not really about age, it’s about performance. I still feel that I am competing at a very high level, and I think the results show that as well. What is important for me is to keep training the way I am and make sure my motivation stays high. If I can do those things, I believe I will keep performing well.I haven’t really thought about retirement yet because I’m very involved in the Mahindra Racing project, and what would make me happiest right now is to be successful with the team.When I’m not racing, I spend quite a lot of time training; that’s a big part of my life outside racing. I’m also involved in a few other projects. Over the past few years, I’ve been working a bit in real estate, and I have a financial background as well, so I stay quite busy even when I’m away from the track.Also read: Antonio Felix da Costa and Mitch Evans present Formula E Oscars, name Funniest Driver, Hardest to Overtake and more awards
Article Summary: Edoardo Mortara is currently second in Formula E Drivers' Standings. The Swiss driver has won two back-to-back poles and two podiums in five races. Mortara also spoke about his other interests in life and his views on retirement.

Article Title: Jack Pugh: Former Wisconsin footballer Jack Pugh dies at 25; cause of death unknown, tragic incident sparks debate about mental health in sports
Article Text:
Former Wisconsin tight end Jack Pugh dies at 25; cause of death unknown, unfortunate incident sparks debate about mental health in sports (via TMZ)

Exploring Jack Pugh’s journey and struggles



Former Wisconsin tight end Jack Pugh has passed away at the age of 25. The Wisconsin football team confirmed the news on Tuesday night. He was part of the squad during the 2021 and 2022 seasons. His sudden passing has left the college football world in shock. Many remember him as a kind and supportive man. The team said he was more than just a player. They described him as someone who spread positivity and touched many lives.Pugh had left football in 2023. He later announced his retirement due to mental health struggles. He spoke openly about dealing with depression and substance issues. He showed courage consistently. He shared his personal challenges. Even after leaving the sport, he focused on improving his life. He stayed at the University of Wisconsin-Madison and completed his degree in 2025. His passing has left fans, teammates, and coaches deeply upset.Jack Pugh was seen as a talented player when he joined Wisconsin in 2021. He was from Columbus, Ohio, and had started playing football only in high school. Despite that, he quickly received offers from top college teams.At Wisconsin, he played one game in the 2022 season and also did well in academics, earning recognition in the Big Ten.But his journey was not easy. In December 2023, he decided to step away from football. He explained that while his body had some issues, it was his mental health that made him take this step. He said he had been dealing with depression and substance problems for a long time. He felt it was important to focus on his life and find happiness.The University of Wisconsin said they are very sad about his death. They described him as a positive person who brought good energy to the team. They also said he cared deeply about others and was loved by teammates and staff. The university mentioned that he completed his degree in 2025 and would always be remembered.The cause of his death has not been shared yet. His passing has again started discussions about mental health in sports. Many people are remembering him as a brave person who spoke honestly about his struggles and wanted a better life.
Article Summary: Former Wisconsin tight end Jack Pugh has passed away at the age of 25. He was part of the squad during the 2021 and 2022 seasons. Pugh had left football in 2023. He later announced his retirement due to mental health struggles. The cause of his death has not been shared.

Article Title: Paige Spiranac: “Not excusing any behavior”: Paige Spiranac sends strong message after Tiger Woods DUI arrest as golf legend steps back
Article Text:
Paige Spiranac and Tiger Woods (Image Via Getty)

Paige Spiranac and Tiger Woods support message highlights growing concern around golfer’s health and recovery

Watch Tiger Woods Speaks After Latest DUI Arrest, Now Taking Step Toward Treatment | WATCH Tiger Woods Speaks After Latest DUI Arrest, Now Taking Step Toward Treatment | WATCH

The golf world woke up to a worrying update about Tiger Woods. The 15-time major winner said he is stepping away from the sport for now. This comes days after his DUI arrest in Florida. Woods made it clear that his focus is no longer golf at the moment. He wants to work on his health and take the time needed to recover.Soon after his statement, support started coming in. One of the most talked-about messages came from Paige Spiranac. She shared a simple but honest note on X. Her words quickly caught attention, as fans also began showing concern for Woods not just as a player, but as a person going through a tough phase.Paige Spiranac wrote, “I think we are all rooting for Tiger. Not as a golfer but more importantly as a person. None of us can fathom what he’s been through both emotionally and physically. Not excusing any behavior but I hope he’s able to get the help he needs in peace without the whole world dog piling on him in a very difficult situation.”Her message came after Woods finally broke his silence. In his own words, he said, “I know and understand the seriousness of the situation I find myself in today.I am stepping away for a period of time to seek treatment and focus on my health. This is necessary in order for me to prioritize my well-being and work toward lasting recovery.”The incident happened in Jupiter Island, Florida. Reports said Woods rolled his car while trying to overtake another vehicle. Police later found hydrocodone pills in his possession. These are usually given for pain relief. Woods has gone through multiple surgeries in recent years, including back and Achilles procedures in 2025.Because of this situation, Woods will not be present at The Masters. Augusta National Golf Club chairman Fred Ridley said they fully support him during this time.This is not the first time Woods has faced such issues. Back in 2017, he was arrested in a similar situation and later went to rehab. At that time, he admitted he had tried to manage pain and sleep problems on his own.Off the course, things have also been in the spotlight. Reports earlier in 2025 linked Woods with Vanessa Trump. However, recent reports suggest there may be tension after this latest incident. Right now, the focus remains on Woods’ recovery. Fans, players, and people from the golf world are hoping he finds stability again.
Article Summary: Paige Spiranac wrote, “I think we are all rooting for Tiger. Not as a golfer but more importantly as a person. None of us can fathom what he’s been through both emotionally and physically.” Her words quickly caught attention, as fans also began showing concern for Woods.

Article Title: Jaxson Dart: Jaxson Dart’s New York Giants tied to $108 million Miami Dolphins wide receiver
Article Text:
Jaxson Dart’s New York Giants tied to $108 million Miami Dolphins wide receiver (Image via Getty: New York Giants logo and Miami Dolphins logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Jaxson Dart ’s Giants linked to Dolphins WR Odell Beckham Jr

Miami WR could reunite with John Harbaugh in New York

Giants WR Malik Nabers wants to play with Dolphins WR Odell Beckham Jr

Odell Beckham Jr. played nine games for the Miami Dolphins in 2024, recording nine receptions for 55 yards with zero touchdowns.In Aug. 2025, he posted seventeen snapshots on Instagram that sparked retirement rumors. He quickly clarified on X, stating: “Please stop reading everything on the internet and stop texting me happy retirement. I promise you, the day I’m done, I will let you know.”Later, in Oct. 2025, he revealed on Ryan Clark’s The Pivot Podcast that he had accepted a six-game suspension for violating the league’s performance-enhancing drug policy. After that, the 33-year-old WR remained a free agent and did not play a single game during the 2025 season.In the 2026 offseason, he has been continuously linked to his parent franchise, the New York Giants. So much so that he recently met with their new head coach, John Harbaugh. What happened next? Let’s find out.ESPN’s Jordan Raanan reported Beckham attended the NFL’s Annual Meetings in Phoenix this week and directly spoke with Harbaugh. Multiple sources told ESPN that no deal is on the horizon. But Raanan said there could be a chance Beckham works out with the team in the coming weeks.The Giants may want to see that before any reunion happens.GM Joe Schoen said on Monday that they would like to see someone like Beckham work out in particular because he has not played in a year. The veteran currently lives and trains in Arizona. But would they consider him?“If we find a player that’s gonna help us, that makes sense for the organization, we’ll continue to pursue,” Schoen said via ESPN. “So, he [Beckham]’s on there, if it makes sense. I know [Harbaugh] talked about it a little bit earlier. We’ll never not pursue someone that can help.”The Giants picked Beckham in the 2014 NFL Draft as their first-round, 12th overall pick. He played five seasons for them. In those five seasons, he recorded 390 receptions for 5,476 yards and 44 touchdowns over 59 games. He was named to the Pro Bowl for three consecutive seasons [2014, 2015, and 2016].The veteran wide receiver even won the 2014 NFL Offensive Rookie of the Year award. He won the PFWA All-Rookie Team in 2014 and two Second-team, All-Pro selections in 2015 and 2016. He is even included in the Top 100 Greatest Giants of All-Time, ranking 37th on the list. He had his best years playing for New York.Though the Giants head coach, John Harbaugh, brought a powerful weapon from his past: Baltimore Ravens tight end Isaiah Likely to New York. There’s another powerful weapon of his from the same team that he could use in his current franchise. Enter: Odell Beckham Jr.The veteran played the 2023 season under Harbaugh in Baltimore. He recorded 35 receptions for 565 receiving yards and three touchdowns in 14 games.When sportscaster Kay Adams asked Beckham how he’d feel about playing for New York before the Fanatics Flag Football Classic event, the Super Bowl LVI champion said, “That sounds great. If that opportunity presents itself, I would love to do that. I would be excited about that.[Jaxson Dart]’s a good dude. He’s young. He likes to dance...I like all that. So, he looks like he likes to have fun…if I get the opportunity.” Beckham may reunite with his former coach, too. But is the coach interested in revamping their 2023 story?At the 2026 NFL Owners Meetings, Harbaugh said, “The obvious answer would be you look at every option. And if Odell is an option, we’ll be looking at him for sure. He and I do talk. We do text. We’ve maintained a really great relationship. He’s one of my very favorite people in the world. It’s not like you don’t talk to guys about things like that. And certainly, we have.”However, Harbaugh wants to wait and see where the possibility goes: “We’ll just have to see how it all goes. What’s best for him, what’s best for the Giants. That is the No. 1 thing. It is what is best for our team and any player. If he helps you be a better team and can make you better, then you’re going to pursue that. We’ll just have to see where that goes.”Like Chiefs defensive tackle Chris Jones expressed his desire to play with former Miami Dolphins wide receiver Tyreek Hill in Kansas City, Giants WR Malik Nabers commented on Beckham’s Instagram post, saying, “Let’s play together.”If Beckham enters New York, he’d likely be behind Malik Nabers, Darnell Mooney, and Darius Slayton. They have also added Isaiah Hodgins and Calvin Austin III in free agency.Beckham as earned over $108M across ten years in the NFL. Spotrac does not have a calculated market value projection for him, but he did sign a one-year, $3M contract with Miami in 2024. Heavy Sports’ Max Dible predicts that Beckham could land a one-year contract for the veteran league minimum.So that leaves us with: would the Giants sign him? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Odell Beckham Jr. played nine games for the Miami Dolphins in 2024, recording nine receptions for 55 yards with zero touchdowns. In the 2026 offseason, he has been continuously linked to his parent franchise, the New York Giants. He recently met with their new head coach, John Harbaugh, and could reunite with his former coach.

Article Title: Ishowspeed: IShowSpeed quits YouTube, fans left speechless by the real reason
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

IShowSpeed’s YouTube exit shock turns into playful prank







Famous online star IShowSpeed surprised many people with a big announcement that made fans worry and talk everywhere. He said he was quitting his YouTube channel, which he uses to stream games, funny videos, and live moments to millions of viewers. Many people reacted fast, sending messages and sharing posts because they couldn’t believe their favorite streamer might really leave the platform. IShowSpeed is one of the most popular content creators in the world, known for energetic and crazy clips that millions love.But soon, the mood changed when fans learned there was another reason behind the announcement. Some online posts and messages pointed out that the news might not be true and could be connected to April Fools’ Day jokes that always spread funny and wild stories online. On April 1 every year, many people share pranks and fake news just to surprise others and make them laugh.The buzz about IShowSpeed quitting YouTube was big news because his videos have millions of followers worldwide. These fans watch his videos to see him play games, react to funny videos, or explore new places online. Many fans immediately shared how they felt after they saw posts saying that IShowSpeed was quitting YouTube.Many fans thought that they would never see him upload another video again.However, in his video, IShowSpeed revealed the truth by the end, and it was all part of an April Fool’s joke! He told his viewers that he was not quitting YouTube. This added a bit of humor to the video, and viewers ended up laughing and even sharing the video more than they normally would have. The viewers were happy and relieved to hear that their favorite YouTuber was not quitting and that they were in for a lot more content from him.In conclusion, this story became a big topic because it was a mix of surprise and internet humor, and IShowSpeed’s joke reminded us all that even our favorite YouTubers want to take part in an April Fool’s joke! The viewers are waiting for his next video, and they are enjoying both his content and his sense of humor!
Article Summary: Online star IShowSpeed surprised many people with a big announcement that made fans worry and talk everywhere. He said he was quitting his YouTube channel, which he uses to stream games, funny videos, and live moments to millions of viewers. On April 1 every year, many people share pranks and fake news just to surprise others and make them laugh.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Las Vegas Raiders urged to explore $58M Cleveland Browns Pro Bowl WR amid concerns over 2025 form
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders urged to explore $58M Cleveland Browns Pro Bowl WR amid concerns over 2025 form.(Image via X)

Las Vegas Raiders tipped to lean on the Cleveland Browns ’ wide receiver Jerry Jeudy amid a poor performance in the last season



The Las Vegas Raiders’ 2025 season was a pretty disappointing one, with it being the fourth season in a row of missing the playoffs.With just three wins and fourteen losses in the last season, the Las Vegas Raiders are working hard on their roster.While the Las Vegas Raiders recently signed Jalen Nailor, the team is now being encouraged to seek the Cleveland Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry Jeudy.A few hours ago, Sports Illustrated’s Ryan Shea noted in a report, “Hypothetically, the Las Vegas Raiders could look to add wide receiver Jerry Jeudy to their roster as they prepare for the 2026 season…”Ryan Shea added, “Jeudy’s proven route running, ability to create separation, and deep-field explosiveness could give the franchise quarterback a reliable weapon right away. His presence would help stretch defenses, open opportunities for other receivers, and immediately elevate the Raiders’ passing attack…”He continued, “Jeudy is a polished route runner who can stretch the field, create separation, and give Mendoza a reliable WR1 to build chemistry with from day one.”This has sparked a debate, considering how the Cleveland Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry Jeudy, failed to perform well in the last season after a stellar performance in the 2024 season.However, the Las Vegas Raiders have stayed away from commenting on the speculations.The Cleveland Browns’ star player, Jerry Jeudy, showed immense potential when he was traded to the team in 2024 by the Denver Broncos.Jerry Jeudy was also named to his first Pro Bowl in the 2024 season after he recorded 90 receptions for 1229 receiving yards with four touchdowns in just 17 games.While the Cleveland Browns’ fans expected a lot from him in the 2025 season, unfortunately, Jerry Jeudy’s performance recorded a steady decline.In the last season, the 26 year old Cleveland Browns’ wide receiver recorded 50 receptions for 602 yards and two touchdowns in 17 games.A few days ago, as per Cleveland.com, analyst Dan Labbe opened up about the decline in his performance as he said, “Maybe the version of Jeudy we saw in 2024 was an outlier, but it’s hard to believe the version we saw in 2025 is going to be what he is for the remainder of his time with the Browns…”With a $58 million contract with the Cleveland Browns, all eyes are on whether Jerry Jeudy will be able to prove his worth in the next season.
Article Summary: Las Vegas Raiders tipped to lean on the Cleveland Browns ’ wide receiver Jerry Jeudy amid a poor performance in the last season. The Las Vegas Raiders’ 2025 season was a pretty disappointing one, with it being the fourth season in a row of missing the playoffs. The team is now being encouraged to seek the Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry JeUDy.

Article Title: Is Manny Pacquiao vs Floyd Mayweather Jr still on? Pacquiao's camp rejects Money’s “uncertain” exhibition fight claim ahead of Las Vegas rematch
Article Text:
Floyd Mayweather Jr. and Manny Pacquiao might finally settle their rivalry in explosive Netflix fight 2026 (Image Via Getty)

Manny Pacquiao team reveals fight is official and not just an exhibition bout



The rematch between Manny Pacquiao and Floyd Mayweather Jr has sparked fresh controversy. The two boxing legends are expected to meet again in September in Las Vegas. The bout is reportedly set to stream live on Netflix. However, confusion has emerged over whether the contest will be an official professional fight or merely an exhibition. Mayweather’s recent comments have created uncertainty. It has left fans questioning the status of the mega event.Pacquiao’s team has now strongly responded, rejecting Mayweather’s claims and insisting the bout is legally agreed as a professional contest. The disagreement has added more drama to a rivalry that dates back over a decade. While the fight was initially announced as a sanctioned clash at the iconic Sphere venue, Mayweather has publicly downplayed those details, triggering a firm reaction from Pacquiao’s side, who maintain that binding agreements are already in place.Manny Pacquiao’s camp has made it clear that the fight is not an exhibition and remains a professional bout as per contract. A representative from his team stated that the agreement signed by both parties clearly defines the contest as an official fight scheduled to take place at the Sphere in Las Vegas.They stressed that all terms were finalized earlier and there is no ambiguity regarding the nature of the bout.The response came shortly after Floyd Mayweather Jr suggested that the fight may not be held at the Sphere and indicated that his unbeaten 50-0 record would not be at stake. He explained that discussions around the venue were still ongoing and hinted that the event would be more about entertainment than competition. According to his remarks, the intention was to deliver a show for fans rather than engage in a high-stakes professional contest.Pacquiao’s promoter, Jas Mathur, also reacted strongly through social media. He suggested that while people may say different things publicly, signed legal agreements carry more weight and cannot be ignored. His statement underlined the confidence within Pacquiao’s team that the fight terms are fixed and enforceable.This disagreement could lead to complications. Especially if Mayweather attempts to alter the fight’s format or location. Reports suggest that doing so may risk breaching contractual obligations. Meanwhile, both fighters are preparing for busy schedules in 2026. Mayweather is linked with multiple bouts, including a possible clash with Mike Tyson and another with kickboxing star Mike Zambidis. Pacquiao, on the other hand, is set to face Ruslan Provodnikov in April.
Article Summary: Manny Pacquiao and Floyd Mayweather Jr are expected to meet again in September in Las Vegas. The bout is reportedly set to stream live on Netflix. But confusion has emerged over whether the contest will be an official professional fight or merely an exhibition. Mayweather’s recent comments have created uncertainty.
